title: Economic Indicator Report
description: JSON Schema for the Economic Indicator Report

financialInstrumentIdentificationSource.description: Unique identification scheme used to identify the instrument

financialInstrumentIdentificationExchang.description: Exchange or market identifier where the financial instrument is listed or traded according to ISO 10383
financialInstrumentIdentificationExchang.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalMarketCode

tickerSymbol.description: Trading symbol or code of the instrument

instrumentDescription.description: Description of the instrument in the trading system

segment.description: Market segment representing the first level of market classification in post-trading process
segment.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalSegmentCode

market.description: Market type representing the second level of market classification in post-trading process
market.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalMarketCode

asset.description: Commodity or asset associated with the instrument

securityCategory.description: Security category representing the third level of market classification in post-trading process
securityCategory.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalSecurityCategoryCode

economicIndicatorTypeCode.description: Code indicating whether the price is an economic indicator or exchange rate
economicIndicatorTypeCode.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalEconomicTypeCode

economicIndicatorBaseCode.description: Number of days in the period used for price calculation or interest correction, e.g., 252, 360, 365

economicIndicatorValueTypeCode.description: Code identifying the presentation format of the economic indicator (price or percentage)
economicIndicatorValueTypeCode.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalValueTypeCode

economicIndicatorEntryReferenceCode.description: Days used as reference for economic indicator appreciation (1=T0, 2=T+1, 3=T-1)

economicIndicatorDecimalPrecision.description: Number of decimal places used in price calculation or for disclosure purposes

economicIndicatorMaturity.description: Code for the maturity interval to be used (1=Monthly, 2=Reference, 3=Validity)
economicIndicatorMaturity.$comment: Consult External Code List table ExternalMaturityCode
